span.p:
Calendar dead zone
or testing window?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SUPPRESS — the dip is seasonal
re-measure at window end

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Rostering sync stale OR
row-count cliff in dead segment?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ROSTERING PRE-FLIGHT first
the dead seats may be a data illusion

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ADOPTION-SEQUENCING — depth before breadth
do NOT call stage-1 modest usage a failure

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Did train-the-trainer cascade
reach the dead segment?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
RE-CASCADE train-the-trainer
to the dead buildings/depts

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
A competing/overlapping tool
is the default in the dead segment?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
USE-CASE RESCOPE + champion arming
not more training; route via recovery-play-design

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
HAND TO 4-HYPOTHESIS DIAGNOSTIC
no dominant cause - recovery-play-design
